title: Amtech L2360 10 Piece 50mm non-slip Pozi drive bit set
features: DURABLE: These non-slip 50mm #2 Pozi drive bits are made from strong S2 grade steel for durability
NON-SLIP: With serrated non-slip tips, they are supplied in a handy storage case
PLEASE NOTE: They are not suitable for use with impact drivers or wrenches
ERGONOMIC USE: Built for comfort and ease of handling during long sessions
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets

The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning No Box Contains 10x Bits See more
